languages.text: "Экспедиция". {n}Произнеся это, Батошски криво усмехается.{/n} "Первый Призыв забрал себе Себериан фон Валанциус. Думаю, они и не жаловались. Это было всяко получше, чем служить мясным щитом другим полкам".

"An expedition." {n}Batoshski grins crookedly as he says it.{/n} "The First Call-Up was requisitioned by Seberian von Valancius. I don't think they complained — better than serving as human shields for other regiments."
languages.original_text: "Экспедиция". {n}Произнеся это, Батошски криво усмехается.{/n} "Первый Призыв забрал себе Себериан фон Валанциус. Думаю, они и не жаловались. Это было всяко получше, чем служить мясным щитом другим полкам".

traits.locale_text: "An expedition." {n}Batoshski grins crookedly as he says it.{/n} "The First Call-Up was claimed by Seberian von Valancius. I don't think they complained — better than serving as human shields for other regiments."

"An expedition." {n}Batoshski grins crookedly as he says it.{/n} "The First Call-Up was claimed by Seberian von Valancius. I don't think they complained — better than serving as human shields for other regiments."

"An expedition." {n}Batoshski grins crookedly as he says it.{/n} "The First Call-Up of the newly formed 32nd Legion was requisitioned by Seberian von Valancius. And our ancestors were shipped to the Koronus Expanse. They were sold into service of the dynasty, in effect. I don't think they complained — better than serving as human shields for other regiments. And Seberian augmented the soldiers, as well. At his own expense, they say. And then he died on campaign somewhere."

"An expedition." {n}Batoshski grins crookedly as he says it.{/n} "The First Call-Up was claimed by Seberian von Valancius. I don't think they complained — better than serving as human shields for other regiments."

"An expedition." {n}Batoshski grins crookedly as he says it.{/n} "The First Call-Up was requisitioned by Seberian von Valancius. I don't think they complained — better than serving as human shields for other regiments."

languages.text: 「遠征隊」{n}バトシュスキーは歪んだ笑顔でそう言った。{/n}「新しく編成された32連隊の初召集隊は、シベリアンのフォン・ヴァランキウスに徴発された。そして、祖先はコーロナス広域に送られた。彼らは、実質的には王朝に仕えるために売却された。彼らは文句を言わなかったと思う。他の連隊の人間盾になるよりはましだ。そしてシベリアンは、自費で兵士を増強させた。そして、彼は遠征先で亡くなった」
languages.original_text: "An expedition." {n}Batoshski grins crookedly as he says it.{/n} "The First Call-Up of the newly formed 32nd Legion was requisitioned by Seberian von Valancius. And our ancestors were shipped to the Koronus Expanse. They were sold into service of the dynasty, in effect. I don't think they complained — better than serving as human shields for other regiments. And Seberian augmented the soldiers, as well. At his own expense, they say. And then he died on campaign somewhere."

traits.locale_text: 「遠征隊」{n}バトシュスキーは歪んだ笑顔でそう言った。「新しく編成された32連隊の初召集隊は、シベリアンのフォン・ヴァランキウスに requisitionされた。そして、祖先はコーロナス広域に送られた。彼らは、実質的には王朝に仕えるために売却された。彼らは文句を言わなかったと思う。他の連隊の人間盾になるよりはましだ。そしてシベリアンは、自費で兵士を増強させた。そして、彼は遠征先で亡くなった。」

languages.text: « Une expédition, {n}répond Batoshski avec un sourire en coin.{/n} C'est Seberian von Valancius qui a ordonné la Première Mobilisation. Je ne pense pas que les conscrits s'en soient plaints, c'était toujours mieux que de servir de boucliers humains à d'autres régiments. »
languages.original_text: "An expedition." {n}Batoshski grins crookedly as he says it.{/n} "The First Call-Up was requisitioned by Seberian von Valancius. I don't think they complained — better than serving as human shields for other regiments."

traits.locale_text: « Une expédition, {n}répond Batoshski avec un sourire en coin.{/n} C'est Seberian von Valancius qui a ordonné la Première Mobilisation. Je ne pense pas que les conscrits s'en soient plaints, c'était toujours mieux que de servir de boucliers humains à d'autres régiments. »

« Une expédition, {n}répond Batoshski avec un sourire en coin.{/n} C'est Seberian von Valancius qui a ordonné la Première Mobilisation. Je ne pense pas que les conscrits s'en soient plaints, c'était toujours mieux que de servir de boucliers humains à d'autres régiments. »

languages.text: "Keşif seferi." {n}Batoshski bunu söylerken çarpık bir sırıtış takınıyor.{/n} "İlk Sevk Grubu'nu Seberian von Valancius talep etti. Şikâyetçi olduklarını sanmam, neticede diğer alaylara canlı kalkan olarak hizmet etmekten iyidir."
languages.original_text: "An expedition." {n}Batoshski grins crookedly as he says it.{/n} "The First Call-Up was requisitioned by Seberian von Valancius. I don't think they complained — better than serving as human shields for other regiments."

traits.locale_text: "Keşif seferi." {n}Batoshski bunu söylerken çarpık bir sırıtış takınıyor.{/n} "İlk Sevk Grubu'nu Seberian von Valancius talep etti. Şikâyetçi olduklarını sanmam, neticede diğer alaylara canlı kalkan olarak hizmet etmekten iyidir."

"Keşif seferi." {n}Batoshski bunu söylerken çarpık bir sırıtış takınıyor.{/n} "İlk Sevk Grubu'nu Seberian von Valancius talep etti. Şikâyetçi olduklarını sanmam, neticede diğer alaylara canlı kalkan olarak hizmet etmekten iyidir."

languages.text: «Una expedición». {n}Batoshski acompaña esas palabras con una sonrisa torva.{/n} «Seberian von Valancius confiscó a los primeros llamados. No creo que se quejaran; era mejor que hacer de escudos humanos para otros regimientos».
languages.original_text: "An expedition." {n}Batoshski grins crookedly as he says it.{/n} "The First Call-Up was requisitioned by Seberian von Valancius. I don't think they complained — better than serving as human shields for other regiments."

traits.locale_text: «Una expedición». {n}Batoshski acompaña esas palabras con una sonrisa torva.{/n} «Seberian von Valancius confiscó a los primeros llamados. No creo que se quejaran; era mejor que hacer de escudos humanos para otros regimientos».

«Una expedición». {n}Batoshski acompaña esas palabras con una sonrisa torva.{/n} «Seberian von Valancius reclamó el mando de los primeros llamados. No creo que se quejaran; era mejor que hacer de escudos humanos para otros regimientos».

languages.text: “远征。”{n}巴托什斯基说出这个词时，歪嘴笑了笑。{/n}“初代征召者是塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯征召的。我想他们也没什么可抱怨的——总比给别的军团当人肉盾牌强。”
languages.original_text: "An expedition." {n}Batoshski grins crookedly as he says it.{/n} "The First Call-Up was requisitioned by Seberian von Valancius. I don't think they complained — better than serving as human shields for other regiments."

traits.locale_text: “远征。”{n}巴托什斯基说出这个词时，歪嘴笑了笑。{/n}“初代征召者是塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯征召的。我想他们也没什么可抱怨的——总比给别的军团当人肉盾牌强。”

languages.text: "Eine Expedition." {n}Batoshski verzieht das Gesicht zu einem schiefen Grinsen.{/n} "Die Erste Einberufung wurde von Seberian von Valancius requiriert. Ich denke, niemand hat sich beschwert ... das war immer noch besser, als anderen Regimentern als menschliche Schilde zu dienen."
languages.original_text: "An expedition." {n}Batoshski grins crookedly as he says it.{/n} "The First Call-Up was requisitioned by Seberian von Valancius. I don't think they complained — better than serving as human shields for other regiments."

traits.locale_text: "Eine Expedition." {n}Batoshski verzieht das Gesicht zu einem schiefen Grinsen.{/n} "Die Erste Einberufung wurde von Seberian von Valancius requiriert. Ich denke, niemand hat sich beschwert ... das war immer noch besser, als anderen Regimentern als menschliche Schilde zu dienen."

"Eine Expedition." {n}Batoshski verzieht das Gesicht zu einem schiefen Grinsen.{/n} "Die Erste Einberufung wurde von Seberian von Valancius eingefordert. Ich denke, niemand hat sich beschwert ... das war immer noch besser, als anderen Regimentern als menschliche Schilde zu dienen."
